"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\vulkan.dir/objects.a
E:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\vulkan.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\vulkan.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\vulkan.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o vulkan.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libvulkan.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\vulkan.dir\linkLibs.rsp
